hyperedges.description: The paper's central 'monotonic decrease' finding: oracle and hand-coded heuristics at 100%, random variants at 30-52%, tabular at 30-35%, neural RL at 13-20%.
The paper's cleanest diagnostic: supervised MLP + BFS labels reaches 99.9% while MLP_DQN reaches 19.3% with same architecture, isolating failure to exploration not representation.
Five reviewer attacks all marked DEFEATED through targeted ablation experiments (K4, DRQN, capacity sweep, LR sweep, reward decomposition).

hyperedges.label: Codex reviews drive Approach C experiment design via risk register
Final results inform paper framing, refining preliminary reframing
Spiking RL canonical citations shared across truth doc, paper, and related work

hyperedges.description: The paper's central 'monotonic decrease' finding: oracle and hand-coded heuristics at 100%, random variants at 30-52%, tabular at 30-35%, neural RL at 13-20%.
The paper's cleanest diagnostic: supervised MLP + BFS labels reaches 99.9% while MLP_DQN reaches 19.3% with same architecture, isolating failure to exploration not representation.
Five reviewer attacks all marked DEFEATED through targeted ablation experiments (K4, DRQN, capacity sweep, LR sweep, reward decomposition).

hyperedges.label: Codex reviews drive Approach C experiment design via risk register
Final results inform paper framing, refining preliminary reframing
Spiking RL canonical citations shared across truth doc, paper, and related work
